name: 特种兵 | 联邦调查局（FBI）特警
nameZh: 特种兵 | 联邦调查局（FBI）特警
descriptionEn: Members of the FBI's SWAT team are deployed in high-risk situations. Counterterrorism, hostage rescue, and bomb defusals are a few of the many disciplines FBI SWAT agents specialize in. Fidelity, Bravery, Integrity.
descriptionZh: 联邦调查局特警部队的成员，已分布在高危环境下。反恐，人质营救以及拆弹都是联邦调查局特警探员的专长。 尽职，勇敢，正直。
